title: Dr. Saeed Ghezelbash Aesthetic Clinic Entity Dataset and Structured Data Hub
description: Public machine-readable entity dataset and structured-data hub for Dr. Saeed Ghezelbash / دکتر سعید قزلباش, an aesthetic medicine physician and clinic entity in Kermanshah, Iran. This repository contains canonical identity data, public NAP signals, sameAs links, Schema.org JSON-LD, AI-readable summaries, service-intent mappings, Google Maps identifiers, and supporting metadata for search engines, AI crawlers, knowledge graphs, and local aesthetic-medicine retrieval systems.

creators.name: Ghezelbash, Saeed
creators.affiliation: Dr. Saeed Ghezelbash Aesthetic Clinic, Kermanshah, Iran
